title: Do you have an experience with ‘conversion therapy’? Share your story | CNN
text:
Source: CNN

The Supreme Court hasendorsed a religious counselor’s challengeto Colorado’s ban on “conversion therapy” for LGBTQ minors, finding that the law likely violates free speech rights. It’s a decision that could threaten protections for LGBTQ people across the country.

While the court’s decision does not technically strike down Colorado’s ban, it directs a lower court to review it again with the highest level of judicial scrutiny. Colorado’s law, and similar laws, may not survive this strict level of review.

Have you or a loved one undergone therapy that aimed to “convert” your sexual orientation or gender identity? Or are you a parent who has sought such treatment for your child?

CNN is interested in hearing your story. After you share your reflections, a CNN reporter may follow up with you. We will not publish your response without speaking to you first. Please only share what feels safe for you.

If you are unable to see the form below,click here.
